findings.title: GitHub Actions workflow detected
findings.description: A GitHub Actions workflow file was found.
findings.recommendation: Pin actions by SHA, set least-privilege permissions, and avoid long-lived secrets.

findings.title: Unpinned GitHub Actions detected
findings.description: Floating tags/branches can increase supply-chain risk.
findings.recommendation: Pin third-party actions to a full commit SHA.
